name: revault_api
desc:
Encrypt files, variables, and typed form records in portable reVault
lockboxes, and manage keys and local vault metadata.

name: AccessSlotLabel
desc: A local human-readable label attached to one lockbox access slot.

name: AccessSlotLabel.new
desc: Creates a AccessSlotLabel value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: lockboxId
desc: Lockbox whose access slot is labelled.

name: name
desc: Local human-readable label for the access slot.

name: slotId
desc: Stable identifier of the labelled access slot.

name: updatedAtUnixMs
desc: Last label update time in Unix milliseconds.

name: AgentEntry
desc: A lockbox key currently held by the local session agent, identified by lockbox and path.

name: AgentEntry.new
desc: Creates a AgentEntry value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: id
desc: Stable lockbox identifier for the cached key.

name: path
desc: Host path associated with the cached lockbox key.

name: CacheStats
desc: Current capacity, occupancy, hit, and miss counters for an open lockbox cache.

name: CacheStats.new
desc: Creates a CacheStats value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: entries
desc: Number of decoded pages currently cached.

name: hits
desc: Reads served by an already decoded page.

name: limitBytes
desc: Maximum decoded-page memory permitted for the cache.

name: misses
desc: Reads that required decoding another page.

name: usedBytes
desc: Decoded-page memory currently held by the cache.

name: Contact
desc: A named recipient public key stored in the local vault address book.

name: Contact.new
desc: Creates a Contact value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: key
desc: Serialized contact public key used to grant lockbox access.

name: name
desc: Local address-book name of the contact.

name: ErrorDetails
desc: Structured category, version, guidance, and artifact context for the most recent native failure.

name: ErrorDetails.new
desc: Creates a ErrorDetails value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: artifactKind
desc: Kind of archive or vault artifact involved in the failure.

name: category
desc: Stable error category suitable for programmatic handling.

name: foundVersion
desc: Format version read from the failing artifact.

name: guidance
desc: Suggested corrective action for the caller or user.

name: message
desc: Human-readable explanation of the failure.

name: supportedVersion
desc: Newest format version supported by this library.

name: FileInspection
desc: Header, owner-signature, and key-slot information read from a lockbox file without opening its contents.

name: FileInspection.new
desc: Creates a FileInspection value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: headerReadable
desc: Whether the archive header passed structural validation.

name: keyDirectoryCopyCount
desc: Number of readable redundant key-directory copies.

name: keyDirectoryGeneration
desc: Latest readable access-key directory generation.

name: keySlots
desc: Password and contact access methods found in the header.

name: lockboxId
desc: Stable binary identifier read from the lockbox header.

name: ownerSigned
desc: Whether commits require an owner signature.

name: FormDefinition
desc: A versioned form schema used to validate and label structured records in a lockbox.

name: FormDefinition.new
desc: Creates a FormDefinition value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: alias
desc: Short name used to resolve the current form revision.

name: description
desc: Explanation shown to people completing the form.

name: fields
desc: Ordered inputs accepted by this form revision.

name: name
desc: Human-readable name shown for this form.

name: revision
desc: Monotonically increasing revision number.

name: typeId
desc: Stable identifier shared by every revision of this form type.

name: FormField
desc: One named input in a reusable form definition, including its display label and sensitivity kind.

name: FormField.new
desc: Creates a FormField value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: id
desc: Stable field identifier used when reading and writing records.

name: kind
desc: Field kind that determines validation and secret handling.

name: label
desc: Human-readable label presented to a person entering data.

name: required
desc: Whether a record must provide a value for this field.

name: FormRecord
desc: A named structured record stored at a lockbox path and tied to a form-definition revision.

name: FormRecord.new
desc: Creates a FormRecord value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: definitionAlias
desc: Alias of the form definition used by the record.

name: definitionRevision
desc: Exact form revision against which the record was created.

name: name
desc: Human-readable name assigned to this record.

name: path
desc: Absolute lockbox path that identifies the record.

name: typeId
desc: Stable identifier of the record's form type.

name: values
desc: Ordered non-secret field metadata and values.

name: FormValue
desc: The current value and sensitivity metadata for one field in a stored form record.

name: FormValue.new
desc: Creates a FormValue value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: fieldId
desc: Identifier of the form field that owns this value.

name: kind
desc: Field kind captured from the form revision.

name: label
desc: Display label captured from the form revision.

name: secret
desc: Whether the value must be read through a scoped secret callback.

name: value
desc: Plain value, or an empty string when the field is secret.

name: ImportStats
desc: Time spent reading host files and preparing encrypted pages during the latest import work.

name: ImportStats.new
desc: Creates a ImportStats value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: framePrepareNanos
desc: Nanoseconds spent preparing encrypted records, as decimal text.

name: hostReadNanos
desc: Nanoseconds spent reading host file content, as decimal text.

name: hostStatNanos
desc: Nanoseconds spent reading host filesystem metadata, as decimal text.

name: pageWriteNanos
desc: Nanoseconds spent writing encrypted pages, as decimal text.

name: KeySlot
desc: One password or contact credential that can unlock a lockbox content key.

name: KeySlot.new
desc: Creates a KeySlot value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: algorithm
desc: Cryptographic algorithm protecting the content key.

name: id
desc: Stable slot identifier used when removing this access method.

name: protection
desc: Access method, such as password or contact key.

name: KnownLockbox
desc: A lockbox identifier and host path remembered by the local vault for later discovery.

name: KnownLockbox.new
desc: Creates a KnownLockbox value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: lastSeenUnixMs
desc: Most recent observation time in Unix milliseconds.

name: lockboxId
desc: Stable binary identifier of the remembered lockbox.

name: path
desc: Last known host filesystem path of the lockbox.

name: LockboxEntry
desc: Metadata for one file, directory, or symbolic link stored at a lockbox path.

name: LockboxEntry.new
desc: Creates a LockboxEntry value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: kind
desc: Filesystem kind: file, directory, or symbolic link.

name: length
desc: Logical file length in bytes; zero for directories.

name: path
desc: Absolute lockbox path of the stored entry.

name: permissions
desc: Portable Unix permission bits stored with the entry.

name: LockboxEntryKind
desc: The kind of filesystem object represented by a LockboxEntry.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: OwnerInspection
desc: Whether a lockbox is owner-signed and, when available, the signing-key fingerprint.

name: OwnerInspection.new
desc: Creates a OwnerInspection value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: fingerprint
desc: Owner signing-key fingerprint when one is configured.

name: hasFingerprint
desc: Whether an owner fingerprint is available.

name: signed
desc: Whether the lockbox requires owner-signed commits.

name: PageInspection
desc: Layout and utilization details for one encrypted page in a lockbox archive.

name: PageInspection.new
desc: Creates a PageInspection value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: encryptedBodyLen
desc: Encrypted body length in bytes.

name: objectCount
desc: Number of logical objects stored in the page.

name: objects
desc: Logical objects discovered in the page.

name: offset
desc: Byte offset at which the page begins in the archive.

name: pageId
desc: Identifier stored in the page header.

name: pageSize
desc: Total encoded page size in bytes.

name: sequence
desc: Commit sequence that wrote this page.

name: unusedBytes
desc: Unused capacity remaining in the page.

name: PageObject
desc: One logical object recorded inside an inspected encrypted lockbox page.

name: PageObject.new
desc: Creates a PageObject value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: id
desc: Object identifier recorded in the encrypted page.

name: kind
desc: Kind of logical object stored in the page.

name: payloadLen
desc: Encrypted object payload length in bytes.

name: PathMove
desc: A source and destination pair used to rename a variable or form record atomically.

name: PathMove.new
desc: Creates a PathMove value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: destination
desc: New variable name or form-record path.

name: source
desc: Existing variable name or form-record path to rename.

name: PlatformStatus
desc: Availability and configuration of the operating-system credential store used for the vault password.

name: PlatformStatus.new
desc: Creates a PlatformStatus value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: backend
desc: Operating-system credential-store backend in use.

name: disabled
desc: Whether the user disabled credential-store integration.

name: item
desc: Credential item name used by the backend.

name: scope
desc: Application-specific scope used to isolate the stored password.

name: supported
desc: Whether a usable operating-system credential store exists.

name: ProfileGeneration
desc: One active or retired generation of the contact keys belonging to a named vault profile.

name: ProfileGeneration.new
desc: Creates a ProfileGeneration value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: contactFingerprint
desc: Fingerprint of this generation's contact public key.

name: createdAtUnixMs
desc: Creation time in Unix milliseconds.

name: hasRetiredAt
desc: Whether a retirement time is present.

name: index
desc: Generation number used to address this key version.

name: retiredAtUnixMs
desc: Retirement time in Unix milliseconds when retired.

name: status
desc: Lifecycle state, such as active or retired.

name: ProfileHistory
desc: The active generation and rotation history for a named vault profile.

name: ProfileHistory.new
desc: Creates a ProfileHistory value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: activeGeneration
desc: Generation number currently used for new access grants.

name: generations
desc: Active and retired contact-key generations.

name: name
desc: Vault profile name whose generations are listed.

name: RecoveryReport
desc: The files and metadata recovered, or found damaged, while inspecting or salvaging a lockbox.

name: RecoveryReport.new
desc: Creates a RecoveryReport value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: corruptRecords
desc: Number of encrypted records that failed validation.

name: formDefinitionCount
desc: Number of recovered form definitions.

name: formRecordCount
desc: Number of recovered form records.

name: formsRecovered
desc: Whether form definitions and records were recovered.

name: intactFileCount
desc: Number of completely recoverable files.

name: intactFiles
desc: Files whose complete contents remain recoverable.

name: partialFiles
desc: Number of files for which only some content is recoverable.

name: tocRecovered
desc: Whether a usable table of contents was recovered.

name: variableCount
desc: Number of recovered variables.

name: variablesRecovered
desc: Whether variable metadata was recovered.

name: RuntimeOptions
desc: The workload and worker policies currently applied to an open lockbox.

name: RuntimeOptions.new
desc: Creates a RuntimeOptions value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: workerPolicy
desc: Worker scheduling policy and effective parallelism.

name: workloadProfile
desc: I/O workload policy used to tune page access.

name: SleepSupport
desc: The host capabilities used to protect cached secrets across suspend and sleep.

name: SleepSupport.new
desc: Creates a SleepSupport value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: sleepInhibition
desc: Whether the agent can delay sleep while handling secrets.

name: supported
desc: Whether the host supplies enough integration for safe caching.

name: suspendNotifications
desc: Whether the host reports impending system suspend.

name: StreamChunk
desc: A logical or physical byte range emitted while walking the contents of a lockbox.

name: StreamChunk.new
desc: Creates a StreamChunk value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: data
desc: File bytes for a populated logical range.

name: fileOffset
desc: Logical byte offset within the file.

name: length
desc: Logical range length in bytes.

name: path
desc: Lockbox file path to which this byte range belongs.

name: physicalOffset
desc: Archive byte offset, when physical streaming is requested.

name: sparse
desc: Whether the range represents a sparse zero-filled extent.

name: Variable
desc: The name and sensitivity classification of a variable stored in a lockbox.

name: Variable.new
desc: Creates a Variable value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: name
desc: Name used to address the variable in the lockbox.

name: sensitivity
desc: Whether the value is ordinary text or a protected secret.

name: VaultBackupManifest
desc: The version, size, checksum, and creation time of an exported local-vault backup.

name: VaultBackupManifest.new
desc: Creates a VaultBackupManifest value for an API input or application-owned copy.

name: createdAtUnixMs
desc: Backup creation time in Unix milliseconds.

name: formatVersion
desc: Backup container format version.

name: vaultFileName
desc: Metadata-vault filename stored in the backup.

name: vaultSha256
desc: Lowercase SHA-256 digest of the encrypted vault payload.

name: vaultSize
desc: Encrypted vault payload size in bytes.

name: AgentActivity
desc: A lifetime token for an operation that currently needs cached secrets.

name: dispose
desc: Ends the registered activity; repeated calls have no effect.

name: ContactKeyPair
desc: A profile's private and public contact-encryption identity.

name: decrypt
desc: Decrypts a content key from wrapped.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes and releases the native private-key handle.

name: export
desc: Exports this key pair using the requested stable format.

name: privateRecord
desc: Returns the private key record for encrypted backup or transfer.

name: publicBytes
desc: Returns the canonical public-key bytes.

name: publicKey
desc: Creates an independently owned public-key handle.

name: ContactPublicKey
desc: A recipient's shareable encryption identity.

name: dispose
desc: Releases the native key handle; repeated calls have no effect.

name: encrypt
desc: Wraps content key so only the corresponding contact can decrypt it.

name: export
desc: Exports this public key using the requested stable format.

name: fingerprint
desc: Returns the canonical fingerprint bytes for this key.

name: LocalVault
desc: A session that manages lockbox files used by a local application.

name: cachePassword
desc: Caches password for lockbox path for ttlSeconds seconds.

name: closeAll
desc: Commits and closes every lockbox opened by this local-vault session.

name: closeLockbox
desc: Commits, closes, and forgets the open lockbox at path.

name: createForContact
desc: Creates a signed lockbox at path and grants contact access.

name: createWithContentKey
desc: Creates a signed lockbox at path using a content key.

name: createWithPassword
desc: Creates and remembers a lockbox at path protected by password.

name: dispose
desc: Closes open lockboxes and ends this local-vault session.

name: openWithContentKey
desc: Opens the signed lockbox at path using a content key.

name: openWithPassword
desc: Opens and remembers the password-protected lockbox at path.

name: Lockbox
desc: An open encrypted archive containing files, variables, secrets, and forms.

name: addContact
desc: Adds a contact access slot with local display name.

name: addFile
desc: Adds value at normalized lockbox path.

name: addPassword
desc: Adds a password access slot and returns its stable slot identifier.

name: addSymlink
desc: Adds a stored symlink from path to lockbox target.

name: bytes
desc: Serializes the current committed lockbox state.

name: cacheStats
desc: Returns current decoded-page cache counters.

name: commit
desc: Authenticates and publishes all staged changes as a new commit.

name: createDirectory
desc: Creates a directory at path, optionally creating missing parents.

name: createFormRecord
desc: Creates a form record at path using typeReference.

name: createParentDirectories
desc: Creates every missing directory above path.

name: defineForm
desc: Defines a new immutable revision of a typed form.

name: delete
desc: Deletes the file, symlink, variable, or form record at path.

name: deleteFormRecord
desc: Deletes the form record at path.

name: deleteKey
desc: Deletes the access slot identified by id.

name: deleteVariable
desc: Deletes the variable named name.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes cached secret state and releases the native lockbox handle.

name: exists
desc: Whether any entry exists at path.

name: extractDirectory
desc: Safely extracts the lockbox tree to host destination.

name: extractFile
desc: Extracts one file from source to host destination.

name: getFile
desc: Returns all bytes stored in the regular file at path.

name: getFormField
desc: Returns a non-secret form field, or an absent optional value.

name: getFormRecord
desc: Returns the form record at path, when present.

name: getVariable
desc: Returns a non-secret variable, or null when name is absent.

name: id
desc: Returns the stable binary identifier of this lockbox.

name: importStats
desc: Returns accumulated file-import timing counters.

name: isDirectory
desc: Whether path identifies a directory.

name: list
desc: Lists children below path, optionally recursively.

name: listFormDefinitions
desc: Lists the current form definitions embedded in this lockbox.

name: listFormRecords
desc: Lists all typed form records without returning secret field values.

name: listFormRevisions
desc: Lists every stored revision for typeId.

name: listKeySlots
desc: Lists password and contact access slots without exposing key material.

name: listVariables
desc: Lists variable names and sensitivity without returning secret values.

name: listWithOptions
desc: Lists entries matching glob with explicit kind and result filters.

name: moveFormRecords
desc: Applies all form-record moves atomically.

name: moveVariables
desc: Applies all variable moves atomically.

name: ownerInspection
desc: Reports whether the lockbox is signed and its owner fingerprint.

name: pageInspection
desc: Returns structural metadata for each currently readable page.

name: permissions
desc: Returns the stored Unix permission bits for path.

name: readRange
desc: Reads at most length bytes at offset from the file at path.

name: recoveryReport
desc: Scans the open lockbox and summarizes recoverable content.

name: removeDirectory
desc: Removes a directory, requiring recursive when it is not empty.

name: rename
desc: Atomically moves an entry from from to to.

name: renderRecoveryReport
desc: Renders a human-readable recovery report.

name: resetImportStats
desc: Resets accumulated file-import timing counters.

name: resolveForm
desc: Resolves a form alias or stable type identifier.

name: runtimeOptions
desc: Returns the effective workload and worker policies.

name: setFormField
desc: Stores a non-secret value in a form field.

name: setOwnerSigningKey
desc: Sets the signing key required to authorize subsequent commits.

name: setPermissions
desc: Replaces the stored Unix permission bits for path.

name: setSecretFormField
desc: Stores a secret form field without creating an immutable string.

name: setSecretVariable
desc: Stores a secret variable without converting it to an immutable string.

name: setVariable
desc: Stores a non-secret UTF-8 variable.

name: setWorkerPolicy
desc: Selects worker mode and its requested jobs count.

name: setWorkloadProfile
desc: Selects a stable runtime workload profile.

name: stat
desc: Returns metadata for path, or an absent optional value when missing.

name: storageLength
desc: Returns the current serialized storage length in bytes.

name: streamContent
desc: Returns logical content chunks, or physical chunks when physical is set.

name: symlinkTarget
desc: Returns the stored target for the symlink at path.

name: variableSensitivity
desc: Returns the sensitivity classification of variable name.

name: withSecretFormField
desc: Invokes callback with temporary field bytes, then wipes the transfer copy.

name: withSecretVariable
desc: Invokes callback with temporary secret bytes, then wipes the transfer copy.

name: LockboxOptions
desc: Memory and CPU settings applied when Vault creates or opens a Lockbox.

name: LockboxOptions.new
desc: Creates runtime options with conservative interactive defaults.

name: cacheBytes
desc: Maximum decoded-page cache capacity in bytes when cacheMode is bytes.

name: cacheMode
desc: Decoded-page cache policy: bytes, disabled, or automatic.

name: jobs
desc: Worker count for policies that accept it; zero requests an automatic count.

name: worker
desc: Worker policy: auto, single, or threads.

name: workload
desc: Workload profile, such as interactive or bulk-import.

name: ReadOnlyVaultDirectory
desc: A restricted view of a local metadata store for discovery and listing.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes decrypted metadata and releases the read-only handle.

name: listContactNames
desc: Lists contact names without loading contact key material.

name: listFormAliases
desc: Lists vault-wide form aliases.

name: listKnownLockboxes
desc: Lists remembered lockbox identifiers and host paths.

name: listProfileNames
desc: Lists profile names without loading private or signing keys.

name: SigningKeyPair
desc: A lockbox owner's private and public signing identity.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes and releases the native signing-key handle.

name: privateRecord
desc: Returns the private signing-key record for secure backup.

name: publicBytes
desc: Returns the canonical signing public-key bytes.

name: publicKey
desc: Creates an independently owned verification-key handle.

name: SigningPublicKey
desc: The shareable half of a lockbox owner's signing identity.

name: dispose
desc: Releases the native verification-key handle.

name: Vault
desc:
Entry point for encrypted lockboxes, keys, local vault metadata, the session
agent, and the platform secret store.

name: Vault.new
desc: Creates a facade over an already loaded reVault library.

name: agentIsRunning
desc: Whether the local secret-caching agent is currently reachable.

name: agentLogDestination
desc: Describes the active agent log destination.

name: agentLogPath
desc: Returns the agent log file path, when file logging is enabled.

name: agentSleepSupport
desc: Reports whether sleep inhibition and suspend notification are supported.

name: backupDefaultVault
desc: Writes an encrypted backup of the default metadata vault to path.

name: beginAgentActivity
desc: Registers a secret-using operation of kind until the result is disposed.

name: changeDefaultVaultDirectoryPassword
desc: Changes the password protecting the platform-default metadata vault.

name: changeVaultDirectoryPassword
desc: Changes the password protecting the metadata vault at root.

name: contactKeyPairFromPrivate
desc: Reconstructs a contact key pair from an exported private value.

name: contactPublicKeyFromBytes
desc: Reconstructs a contact public key from its canonical value.

name: createLockbox
desc: Creates an unsigned in-memory lockbox protected by key.

name: createLockboxForContact
desc: Creates a lockbox whose content key is wrapped for contact.

name: createLockboxWithPassword
desc: Creates an in-memory lockbox protected by password.

name: createSignedLockbox
desc: Creates a lockbox protected by key and authorized by signing.

name: currentVaultStructureVersion
desc: Returns the current on-disk local-vault structure version.

name: decodeKeyCrockford
desc: Decodes a Crockford key representation into canonical bytes.

name: decodeKeyHex
desc: Decodes a canonical grouped hexadecimal key representation.

name: defaultVaultDirectory
desc: Returns the platform-default metadata-vault directory.

name: defaultVaultPath
desc: Returns the platform-default metadata-vault data path.

name: disablePlatformStore
desc: Disables use of the platform secret store without deleting its item.

name: enablePlatformStore
desc: Enables use of the platform secret store.

name: forgetAgentKey
desc: Removes the key cached under id.

name: forgetAgentOwnerSigningKey
desc: Removes the cached owner signing key for a vault profile.

name: forgetAgentVaultUnlockKey
desc: Removes the cached unlock key for vaultId.

name: forgetAllAgentSecrets
desc: Removes every cached secret from the agent.

name: forgetPlatformPassword
desc: Deletes the password stored in the selected platform scope.

name: formatKeyCrockford
desc: Formats key value using the canonical Crockford representation.

name: formatKeyCrockfordReading
desc: Normalizes value for human-readable Crockford comparison.

name: formatKeyHex
desc: Formats key value as the canonical grouped hexadecimal fingerprint.

name: generateContactKeyPair
desc: Generates a contact encryption key pair in secure native memory.

name: generateSigningKeyPair
desc: Generates an owner signing key pair in secure native memory.

name: getAgentKey
desc: Returns the key cached under id.

name: getAgentOwnerSigningKey
desc: Returns the cached owner signing key for a vault profile.

name: getAgentVaultUnlockKey
desc: Returns the cached unlock key for vaultId.

name: getPlatformPassword
desc: Loads the password stored in the selected platform scope.

name: hexDecode
desc: Decodes hexadecimal value into bytes.

name: hexEncode
desc: Encodes arbitrary bytes as lowercase hexadecimal text.

name: importContactKeyPair
desc: Imports a supported private-key record from value.

name: importContactPublicKey
desc: Imports a supported public-key record from value.

name: inspectLockboxFile
desc: Inspects clear-text structural metadata in the lockbox file at path.

name: lastError
desc: Returns the diagnostic for the most recent failed call on this isolate.

name: lastErrorDetails
desc: Returns structured details for the most recent failed native call.

name: listAgentKeys
desc: Lists the non-secret identifiers currently known to the agent.

name: load
desc: Loads the bundled native library, verifies its ABI, and creates a facade.

name: lockboxFormatVersion
desc: Returns the lockbox format version written by this library.

name: openDefaultReadOnlyVaultDirectory
desc: Opens the default metadata vault without loading signing keys.

name: openLocalVault
desc: Starts a local-vault session for lockboxes addressed by host file paths.

name: openLockbox
desc: Opens archive using its content key.

name: openLockboxForContact
desc: Opens archive using a contact private key.

name: openLockboxWithPassword
desc: Opens archive using a password access slot.

name: openOrCreateDefaultVaultDirectory
desc: Opens or creates the platform-default metadata vault.

name: openOrCreateVaultDirectory
desc: Opens or creates a writable metadata vault at root.

name: openReadOnlyVaultDirectory
desc: Opens a metadata-only view at root without loading signing keys.

name: openVaultDirectory
desc: Opens the writable local metadata vault at root.

name: platformStatus
desc: Reports availability and configuration of the platform secret store.

name: platformStoreDisabled
desc: Whether use of the platform secret store is disabled.

name: probeLockboxFormatVersion
desc: Reads the format version from lockbox value without opening it.

name: probeVaultStructureVersion
desc: Opens enough metadata at root to determine its structure version.

name: putAgentKey
desc: Caches key under opaque identifier id.

name: putAgentOwnerSigningKey
desc: Caches key for a vault profile for ttlSeconds seconds.

name: putAgentVaultUnlockKey
desc: Caches a vault unlock key for ttlSeconds seconds.

name: putPlatformPassword
desc: Stores password in the selected platform scope.

name: replaceDefaultVaultDirectory
desc: Replaces the platform-default metadata vault with a new empty vault.

name: replaceVaultDirectory
desc: Replaces the metadata vault at root with a new empty vault.

name: restoreDefaultVault
desc: Restores the default metadata vault from encrypted backup path.

name: salvageLockbox
desc: Salvages intact state from archive into a new clean lockbox.

name: scanLockbox
desc: Scans possibly damaged lockbox archive bytes using key.

name: scanLockboxPath
desc: Scans a possibly damaged lockbox at path using key.

name: serveAgent
desc: Runs the agent server loop until it is asked to stop.

name: setPlatformScope
desc: Selects the platform-store namespace identified by scope.

name: signingKeyPairFromPrivate
desc: Reconstructs an owner signing key pair from a private record.

name: signingPublicKeyFromBytes
desc: Reconstructs a signing public key from its canonical bytes.

name: startAgent
desc: Starts the platform agent service.

name: stopAgent
desc: Requests that the running agent stop.

name: verifyAgentTransport
desc: Verifies that the agent transport has the required security properties.

name: VaultDirectory
desc: A writable, password-protected metadata store for one reVault installation.

name: backupCount
desc: Returns the number of stored key-directory backups.

name: contactExists
desc: Whether contact name exists.

name: defineForm
desc: Defines a new immutable revision of a vault-wide form.

name: deleteContact
desc: Deletes contact name.

name: deletePrivateKey
desc: Deletes the active private key and its signing key for name.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes decrypted state and releases the writable vault handle.

name: findAccessSlotLabels
desc: Finds labels named name for lockbox id.

name: forgetAccessSlotLabel
desc: Deletes the local label for one lockbox access slot.

name: forgetLockbox
desc: Forgets the lockbox remembered at host path.

name: listAccessSlotLabels
desc: Lists local access-slot labels for lockbox id.

name: listContactNames
desc: Lists stored contact names.

name: listContacts
desc: Lists stored contacts and their public-key records.

name: listFormAliases
desc: Lists stored form aliases.

name: listFormRevisions
desc: Lists every vault-wide revision for typeId.

name: listForms
desc: Lists current vault-wide form definitions.

name: listKnownLockboxes
desc: Lists remembered lockbox identifiers and host paths.

name: listPrivateKeyNames
desc: Lists profile names that have private contact keys.

name: listPrivateKeys
desc: Lists serialized private-key records for backup workflows.

name: listProfileGenerations
desc: Lists active and retired key generations for profile name.

name: loadBackup
desc: Loads the encrypted key-directory backup for lockbox id.

name: loadContact
desc: Loads the public key for contact name.

name: loadContactSigningKey
desc: Loads the signing public key stored for contact name.

name: loadOwnerSigningKey
desc: Loads the active owner signing key for profile name.

name: loadOwnerSigningKeyGeneration
desc: Loads historical owner-signing generation index for name.

name: loadPrivateKey
desc: Loads the active private contact key for name.

name: loadPrivateKeyGeneration
desc: Loads historical private-key generation index for name.

name: privateKeyExists
desc: Whether a profile private key exists under name.

name: profileEmail
desc: Returns the email associated with profile name, when present.

name: rememberAccessSlotLabel
desc: Stores local display name for one lockbox access slot.

name: rememberLockbox
desc: Remembers that lockbox id is stored at host path.

name: rememberPassword
desc: Remembers a lockbox password under lockbox id.

name: rememberedPassword
desc: Returns the password remembered for lockbox id.

name: resolveForm
desc: Resolves a vault-wide form alias or stable type identifier.

name: restorePrivateKey
desc: Restores a profile key pair and its owner signing key.

name: root
desc: Returns the canonical root directory of this metadata vault.

name: rotatePrivateKey
desc: Rotates profile name to newly generated contact and signing keys.

name: seedForms
desc: Installs any built-in form definitions that are not already present.

name: storeBackup
desc: Stores encrypted key-directory backup value under lockbox id.

name: storeContact
desc: Stores key as the public key for contact name.

name: storeContactSigningKey
desc: Stores a contact's signing public key under name.

name: storePrivateKey
desc: Stores key as the active private contact key for name.

name: storeProfileEmail
desc: Stores the contact email associated with profile name.

name: structureVersion
desc: Returns the on-disk metadata-vault structure version.

name: WrappedContactKey
desc: An encrypted content key addressed to one contact.

name: ciphertext
desc: Returns the encapsulated key ciphertext.

name: dispose
desc: Wipes and releases the native envelope handle.

name: encryptedBytes
desc: Returns the complete serialized encrypted-key envelope.

name: publicBytes
desc: Returns the ephemeral public material stored with this envelope.
